rationale: The citing note states the paper "extends prior UGC and social media engagement research" and specifically contrasts its contribution with prior "text-centric" work, while the cited paper is a core text-based UGC study linking online reviews to sales. This makes the citation plausibly foundational/background-theory for the research gap rather than a clearly incidental mention. With only DOI-level match and no context sentence, it should be retained for full relation judgment rather than dropped.
